data.name: Squirtle

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Withdraw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

data.flavor_text: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

data.name: Wartortle

attacks.name: Withdraw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

data.flavor_text: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. When swimming quickly, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

data.name: Blastoise

abilities.name: Rain Dance
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Water Pokémon. This Pokémon Power can't be used if this Pokémon is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each extra Water Energy attached to this Pokémon (in addition to this attack's cost). You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

data.flavor_text: A brutal Pokémon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high-speed tackles.

data.name: Staryu

attacks.name: Recover
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon and heal all damage from it.

data.flavor_text: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.

data.name: Starmie

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: At the center of its body is a red core, which sends mysterious radio signals into the night sky.

data.name: Magikarp
data.flavor_text: For no reason, it jumps and splashes about, making it easy for predators like PIDGEOTTO to catch it mid-jump.

data.name: Gyarados

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

data.name: Lapras

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Ice Blade
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

data.flavor_text: They have gentle hearts. Because they rarely fight, many have been caught. Their number has dwindled.

data.name: Articuno

attacks.name: Freeze-Dry
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

data.flavor_text: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

abilities.name: Aqua Lift
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Crystal Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

data.name: Drowzee

attacks.name: Psychic Boom
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: It finds really fun dreams tasty. When it makes friends with people, it may show them the most delicious dreams it's ever eaten.

data.name: Hypno

attacks.name: Meditate
attacks.text: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

data.flavor_text: As a matter of course, it makes anyone it meets fall asleep and has a taste of their dreams. Anyone having a good dream, it carries off.

data.name: Mr. Mime

abilities.name: Dampening Shield
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Juggling
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

data.flavor_text: If interrupted while miming, it will slap around the enemy with its broad hands.

data.name: Mewtwo

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Barrier
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon. If 1 of your Pokémon used Barrier during your last turn, this attack can't be used.

data.flavor_text: A Pokémon whose genetic code was repeatedly recombined for research. It turned vicious as a result.

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Gnaw attack does 20 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Super Fang
attacks.text: Put damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon until its remaining HP is halved, rounded down. (If your opponent's Active Pokémon has 30 HP remaining, put 2 damage counters on it.)

data.name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Comet Punch
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

data.flavor_text: It raises its offspring in its belly pouch. It lets the baby out to play only when it feels safe.

data.name: Boss's Orders
rules: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

data.name: Computer Search
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Drops in the Ocean
rules: The attacks used by the Blastoise this card is attached to do 100 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

data.name: Fisherman
rules: Put up to 4 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

data.name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Pokémon Fan Club
rules: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Professor Oak
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

data.name: Rare Candy
rules: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

data.name: Rocket's Admin
rules: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.

data.name: Super Rod
rules: Shuffle up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

data.name: Switch
rules: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

data.name: Ultra Ball
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: VS Seeker
rules: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.

data.name: Double Colorless Energy
rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides 2 Colorless Energy.
